## Reference Pattern

## Reusable pattern

Explain the shared workflow shape and where it should or should not be reused.

## Required checks

- [ ] Frontmatter uses `content_type: reference-pattern`
- [ ] `review_status`, `assumptions`, and `risks` are set
- [ ] Pattern fit is described
- [ ] Human approval points are explicit
- [ ] Security notes are explicit
- [ ] Token-cost notes are explicit
- [ ] `npm run check` passes
